{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323030902A4D90B68A328B8D80355"}"},"total":335},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7435149357136692030","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，作品也符合实际，可以看出作者有丰厚的经验。文笔也很好，情节我也非常喜欢看。像养成游戏一样。题材比较新颖，是穿越回现代，从幼儿园开始学习。对现在的生活也有一定的启发。只是作者似乎是死了。一年半没更新了，🌿[怒]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731136490,"group_id":"7283033590139456531","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"别看我看书时间短，我听书时长1000小时了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7YYNFHs3diPzSDehz4yCnE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/461cea3c70d5452e9377b784224a9993~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792993&x-signature=JdChsL67XGiaANOpS%2BYJddAD990%3D","user_id":"284131420023208","user_name":"是时候想个好名字了"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"284131420023208","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7283033590139456531","book_info":{"abstract":"一睁眼，陆子明发现重生回到2004年！
他还是个幼儿园中班的小朋友，眼前有个超可爱要缠着他玩过家家的青梅！
被娇憨，呆萌的她拉着手拽去玩的时候，陆子明思考着这一世一定要活出人样来！
想想工厂主管唾沫横飞，狗血淋头的辱骂；想想朝那些讨厌的人卑躬屈膝，无奈迎合的瞬间。
陆子明紧紧的握住了小拳头！
做学霸！搞科研！拼命进取！他暗自在心中定下目标。
“叮——宿主，您的神级学霸系统已绑定！！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/9e76b1e5118de727a45a0907995430a3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"陈雁","author_id":"","book_id":"7283033590139456531","book_name":"重生：我神级学霸青梅超可爱","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1008人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7283204038596758569","read_count":"1008","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"304638"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"112","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,重生,学霸,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9e76b1e5118de727a45a0907995430a3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779390542&x-signature=VgpcGJg6JVH4IcQ6al4rAuhgqbs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"76"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323030902A4D90B68A328B8D80355"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_dur
